{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = Security constructs
| introduced = Unsouled
}}

== Wintersteel ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Security constructs]] can use launchers to attack.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c10">''Wintersteel'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Bloodline ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Elder Rahm]] has four oblong security constructs floating behind him.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c6">''Bloodline'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
